title: HBM BaseCenter
description: Custom mod for hosting HBM:NTM war events. Adds custom teams, teamchat, special team BaseCenter entities and combat logging.
body:
Custom mod made for hosting team wars involving [HBM's Nuclear Tech Mod](https://modrinth.com/mod/ntm). However, it can be used without the mod.

Join the [discord](https://discord.gg/unx4JVr7VW) to take part in these events!

## This mod adds:
- Special **BaseCenter** entities that are linked to teams. They act as a spawnpoint and primary objective for teams; destroying a team's BaseCenter will eliminate the team. BaseCenter entities are immovable, solid, and can only be damaged _directly_ (for example, it is immune to fire, NTM radiation and potion effects).
- **Custom teams**, alongside teamchatting, colored names and disabled friendly fire.
- **Combat logging** mechanics, where leaving while in combat will kill you and drop all your items.
- **Commands** to use the mod (/team [...], /teamchat <message>, /toggleteamchat [on|off]). /team can only be used by server operators.

Also adds some configuration options, such as changing what damage types can damage BaseCenters, preventing players without a team from joining the server as well as preventing players without a team BaseCenter from joining the server.

When a BaseCenter reaches a set health threshold, it becomes temporarily immune to damage (indicated by a blue healthbar), except NTM nuclear blasts. This can be configured.
